opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These purple bumps on my wrists have been itching so badly I've scratched my skin raw, and I haven't slept in two days.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The itch became unbearable tonight and I've made the skin bleed from scratching — I'm scared it's something contagious and I can't cope without sleep.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 3 days ago the itchy bumps first appeared; the itch became intensely sharp and unrelenting tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 days, much worse in the last day
symptom_narrative.character: small purple, flat bumps that itch fiercely; I've scratched some of them open and raw
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the itch is unbearable — I haven't slept in two days and I feel wrecked
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on my wrists, and I've noticed some on my ankles too
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant itch, feels worse at night when I'm trying to sleep
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really helps — scratching gives a second of relief then it's worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: scratching, and it seems worse at night
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever that I've noticed, no trouble breathing, no new rashes anywhere else
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I don't think I've had anything quite like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sleep and I'm exhausted; I keep scratching without realising

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried because there is no one at home to help if the scratched skin gets infected

objective_data_offered.value: clusters of small purple and brownish flat bumps on the inner wrists, with several scratched-open raw spots and tiny specks of dried blood
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: shown by the patient over a phone camera; lighting and image quality limit assessment and a close skin or dermoscopic exam is not possible remotely

objective_data_offered.value: reports feeling no fever and says the skin around the scratches does not feel hot to touch
